attributes.description: Alerts when `oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks` increases. Deadlocks cause ORA-00060 and rolled-back transactions.
attributes.name: [Oracle OTel] Enqueue deadlocks detected

investigation_guide.blob:
## Oracle enqueue deadlocks detected

### What fired
Counter `oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks` increased during the window.

### Why it matters
Deadlocks are resolved by aborting one transaction (ORA-00060). Sustained deadlocks point to inconsistent access order or overly broad transactions.

### Triage
1. Inspect the alert log for deadlock graphs.
2. Identify the offending SQL.

### Remediation
- Enforce consistent access order.
- Use finer-grained locking.

### Tuning
- Fires on any increase.
